Welcome to the Musu documentation. This guide will help you set up your first distributed computing environment.

# Musu Project

A distributed computing platform.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @musu/cli
```

## Usage

```typescript
import { Musu } from '@musu/core';

const app = new Musu();
app.start();
```
